task_completion.description: Adjust column widths to eliminate excessively wide columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Agent selecting and resizing columns in the spreadsheet view, or using the Column Width dialog to reduce the width of wide columns (like Description or Notes) so they fit the content better without huge empty spaces.

task_completion.description: Configure the page orientation to Landscape.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Page Style dialog (Format -> Page Style), on the 'Page' tab, the 'Landscape' orientation radio button is selected.

task_completion.description: Configure page margins to be between 0.5 and 1.0 inches (1.27 to 2.54 cm).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Page Style dialog, on the 'Page' tab, the Left, Right, Top, and Bottom margins are adjusted to values between 0.5" and 1.0" (or 1.27cm - 2.54cm).

task_completion.description: Configure the print scaling to 70-95% or fit to page width.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Page Style dialog, on the 'Sheet' tab, the Scaling mode is set to 'Reduce/enlarge printout' with a value between 70% and 95%, OR set to 'Fit print range(s) to width/height'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the document fits on a reasonable number of pages horizontally (≤2).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Print Preview window is opened showing all 9 columns fitting across 1 or 2 pages horizontally, OR the scaling is explicitly set to fit to 1 or 2 pages wide in the Page Style dialog.

integrity.description: Agent used the spreadsheet software's GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Agent interacts with LibreOffice Calc (or similar) menus and dialogs, rather than writing a Python script or using terminal commands to modify the ODS file.

integrity.description: Agent modified the provided spreadsheet file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The spreadsheet being edited contains the 51 rows and 9 columns of inventory data (SKU, Product Name, Category, etc.), not a blank or newly created document.

integrity.description: Agent did not delete data to make it fit.
integrity.visual_evidence: All 9 columns and 51 rows remain intact; the agent only adjusts layout settings and column widths rather than deleting columns or rows.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The spreadsheet has 51 rows and 9 columns (SKU, Product Name, Category, Description, Unit Price, Stock Qty, Supplier, Warehouse Location, Notes). The initial layout is poor with some columns up to 6cm wide, causing it to spill over many pages. To pass, the agent must: 1) Set orientation to Landscape. 2) Set scaling to 70-95% or fit-to-page. 3) Optimize column widths so none are excessively wide (>5 inches or >2.5x average). 4) Set margins to 0.5-1.0 inches (1.27-2.54 cm). 5) Ensure the document fits on 1-2 pages horizontally. The agent should use the spreadsheet software's GUI (e.g., Format -> Page Style in LibreOffice Calc) to make these changes.
